title: Non-Record : Hybrid XSA-SSM
author: Jash-Vora

data.description: Replaced the middle transformer layer with a Mamba SSM block as a bottleneck in a U-Net-style encoder-decoder stack.
Applied torch._dynamo.disable to the Mamba forward call to avoid TorchDynamo tracing issues with custom CUDA kernels.

novel_contributions: Inserted a Mamba SSM block at the midpoint bottleneck of the model
Routed Mamba internal parameters to AdamW instead of Muon
Disabled TorchDynamo tracing for the Mamba forward pass
